title: 'Allesmassiv' carpentry
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 29 CH1. This is an example of an innovative small local carpentry in Tenna, Grisons using only local wood and producing traditional as well as modern furniture and other wood products. The production is in the area of a nature park and is sold with a corresponding label.
